mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in industrial production signals improving real output and near-term earnings momentum; higher INDPRO growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment marks deteriorating labor income and recession risk; when UNRATE crosses up by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months, S&P 500 returns turn negative over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 4.5% tightens discount rates and credit conditions; when FEDFUNDS is high and non-declining, valuation pressure predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if high and non-declining FEDFUNDS regimes have 60-day forward returns above the sample median in more than 55% of instances or show no negative return differential versus other regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales acceleration reflects stronger household demand and revenue growth; when RSAFS rises faster than its prior 6-month pace, S&P 500 returns are positive over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth exceeds its prior 6-month growth
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS accelerations are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 52% of cases or the triggered mean return is not above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts lead construction, durable goods demand, and bank credit quality; when HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average, the demand impulse predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if downward HOUST crossovers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or the signal has a nonnegative average excess return versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth paired with falling unemployment confirms broad labor-market strength; when PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls over 3 months, earnings expectations improve and S&P 500 returns are positive over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-strength condition fails to outperform either single-series condition and produces positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 52% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation with a high policy rate signals margin pressure and restrictive monetary conditions; when CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS exceeds 4%, S&P 500 returns are negative over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-tightening observations produce positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or do not underperform non-triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity breadth is strongest when output and consumption rise together; when GDPC1 growth is positive and RSAFS 3-month growth is positive, synchronized demand predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly growth > 0 and RSAFS 3-month growth > 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-demand condition has a lower 60-day mean return than either GDPC1-only or RSAFS-only positive signals, or positive returns occur in less than 52% of triggers.
